adminPage.title: Operations panel
adminPage.description: Manage content, protection artifacts, support, and emergency access according to your operator role.
adminPage.noAccessTitle: This role has no operator access
adminPage.noAccessBody: Use the appropriate operator account or return to the main dashboard.
adminPage.contentDescription: New content is always saved as a draft so it can be reviewed before publication.
adminPage.moduleCreateError: The module draft could not be created.
adminPage.noModules: No modules are available for this role yet.
adminPage.releaseDescription: Only artifacts that exist in controlled server storage and match their checksum can be recorded as validated.
adminPage.gateContract: Input contract and threshold are recorded
adminPage.releaseValidated: The artifact was recorded as validated.
adminPage.releaseCreateError: The artifact failed validation. Check the file, checksum, and contract.
adminPage.supportDescription: Tickets show persisted case data; handling details remain subject to operator auditing.
adminPage.noTickets: There are no support tickets in the queue.
adminPage.emergencyDescription: The protected user creates a device-bound request. One platform admin reviews it and a different platform admin issues the single-use key.
adminPage.requestCreated: Request created. Waiting for a second platform admin.
adminPage.requestReviewed: Request reviewed. A different platform admin must issue the key.
adminPage.waitingSecondAdmin: Your request is waiting for another platform admin.
adminPage.noEmergencyRequests: There are no emergency access requests awaiting approval.
adminPage.keyReadyBody: Copy it now. This value is shown only after approval and is valid for one use within 24 hours.
adminPage.keyError: The emergency access workflow could not be processed.
adminPage.moduleSaveError: The draft could not be saved. Complete both languages, thumbnail, checks, reviewer, and sources.
adminPage.moduleTransitionError: The module status could not be changed.
adminPage.mediaUploadError: Media could not be processed. Check its format, size, or external domain.
adminPage.externalMediaQuestion: Choose OK for external media. Choose Cancel to upload an image, video, or PDF.
adminPage.externalMediaURL: Enter an HTTPS URL from an allowed domain.
adminPage.externalMediaType: Media type: image, video, or pdf.
adminPage.mediaAltPrompt: Write alternative text for this media.
adminPage.mediaRequiredQuestion: Must this media be opened to complete the module?
adminPage.thumbnailsHelp: Use 1–8 16:9 images. The first image is used as the card cover.
adminPage.question: Question
adminPage.explanation: Explanation shown after a correct answer
adminPage.thumbnailCropBody: Outputs a 1600 × 900 WebP at a 16:9 ratio.
adminPage.platformDescription: Manage public channels, operator accounts, and the audit trail. Sensitive changes require recent authentication.
adminPage.socialSaveError: Links could not be saved. Ensure each domain matches its platform and uses HTTPS.
adminPage.inviteOperatorHelp: The operator receives a one-time link valid for 24 hours.
adminPage.operatorActionError: The operator action could not be processed.
adminPage.reasonPrompt: Enter a reason for this action.
adminPage.revisionHistoryHelp: Saved versions can be restored as a new draft without changing the published version.
adminPage.rollbackReasonPrompt: Why should this revision be restored?
adminPage.rollbackSuccess: Revision restored as a new draft.
adminPage.rollbackError: The revision could not be restored.
adminPage.claimReasonPrompt: Enter a reason for claiming this case.
adminPage.releaseReasonPrompt: Enter a reason for releasing this case.
adminPage.caseClaimed: The case is now in your work queue.
adminPage.caseReleased: The case returned to the shared queue.
adminPage.caseActionError: The case action could not be processed.
adminPage.caseOwnedByOther: Another operator is handling this case.
adminPage.dataRequestsHelp: Exports are processed with encryption. Operators may retry failed requests only.
adminPage.dataRequestActionError: The data request could not be updated.
adminPage.rolloutDescription: Activate a validated artifact for a device cohort, then pause, complete, or roll it back with an audit trail.
adminPage.rolloutError: The rollout could not be processed.
adminPage.uploadArtifactFirst: Upload an artifact to generate its safe path
adminPage.artifactUploaded: Artifact stored and checksum calculated automatically.
adminPage.artifactUploadError: The artifact could not be uploaded. Check its type or size.

operatorInvitation.title: Complete your operator account
operatorInvitation.description: This link can be used once. Create a password to access the workspace assigned to your role.
operatorInvitation.invalidBody: The link may have been used, revoked, or expired.
operatorInvitation.name: Display name
operatorInvitation.success: Operator account activated. Sign in with your email and new password.
operatorInvitation.error: The operator account could not be activated.

researchSandbox.title: Synthetic research sandbox
researchSandbox.description: Review evaluation flows, schemas, and displays with deterministic fixtures without recruiting participants or using real user data.
researchSandbox.inviteBody: This space is intended for invited evaluators and platform administrators.
researchSandbox.warningBody: Every number, participant, and outcome on this page is synthetic dummy data for product testing. These figures must not be cited as effectiveness evidence.
researchSandbox.stagesBody: Choose a stage to review its data shape and internal export.
researchSandbox.fixtureBody: Each stage uses 48 deterministic records with explicit synthetic labels.
researchSandbox.footnote: Enrollment, participant consent, and real research-data exports remain locked until an applicable protocol and ethics approval are available.
